services.label: Services
services.title: What I Build for Business
services.subtitle: Solutions that translate technical complexity into measurable business value — deployed and maintained with enterprise-grade reliability.
services.cloud_desc: Migrate your organization to Microsoft 365 and Azure. Modern identity management with Entra ID, automated device lifecycle with Intune & Autopilot, and enterprise-grade security — without the overhead.
services.apps_desc: Purpose-built Progressive Web Apps (PWAs) that replace manual processes with fast, installable, multilingual digital systems. From logistics tracking to facility management — built to score 100/100 on performance.
services.apps_case: → Case: Dnamar Facility Services — real-time operations platform across 4 languages.
services.network_desc: Enterprise network design for multi-site businesses: VLAN segmentation, VPN configuration, DNS/DHCP, and hybrid identity — ensuring every team stays connected and every device stays inside your security perimeter.

hero.availability_swiss: Immediate availability across Switzerland and Liechtenstein
hero.title: IT Solutions Engineer:
hero.subtitle: Turning technical complexity into measurable business value — Cloud Transformation, Custom Business Apps, and Hybrid Networking for enterprises across Switzerland and Liechtenstein.
hero.collaboration: Open to individual projects and collective collaborations.

experience.title: Experience
